free_text: ELASTIC AND INELASTIC SCATTERING OF 800 MEV PROTONS
NI-58 WAS USED AS TARGET.ANY ADDITIONAL INFORMATION IS
* BY AUTHORS* THE ENERGY RESOLUTION IS 80 KEV, FWHM.
THE  EXCITATION ENERGIES ARE EXPECTED TO BE ACCURATE TO
AN AUTOMATIC PEAK FITTING CODE WAS USED TO ANALYZE EACH
SPECTRUM, BINNED IN ANGLE BITES OF 6 MR.
THE UNCERTAINTY IN ABSOLUTE SCATTERING ANGLE IS
+-1 MR, WHICH IS COMPARABLE TO THE ANGULAR RESOLUTION.
